CustomField.description: True when at least one OpportunityLineItem carries a per-line Discount > 0. Rolled up from the OLIs by OpportunityLineItemTriggerHandler so the Discount_Reason_Required_High_Value validation rule can key off an actual discount instead of the Amount >= 100k proxy.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Maintained by the OpportunityLineItem trigger — do not edit manually. Checked when any product line on this opportunity is discounted.
CustomField.label: Is Discounted
